steps.title: Center the Aspera mission
steps.content: The text focuses on NASA's Aspera mission and what it will reveal: previously unobservable warm-hot CGM gas that may fuel star formation, hold much of a galaxy's mass, and help explain how galaxies change and interact.

steps.title: Separate partial summaries
steps.content: Choice A overemphasizes Vargas and omits the warm-hot gas. Choice B describes only the current observation limit and adds an unsupported claim about studied galaxies. Choice C is too general and leaves out Aspera. The main idea must include Aspera's expected direct observations and the gas's role in galaxy evolution. The answer is D.
